title: Identify Unauthorized Use of Organizational Systems
description: Identify unauthorized use of organizational systems.

checks.name: Logon Event Auditing is Enabled to Detect Unauthorized Access
checks.purpose: Verify logon success and failure auditing is enabled so unauthorized access attempts can be detected and investigated

checks.name: Account Usage Anomaly Detection is Active
checks.purpose: Confirm a SIEM or EDR solution is configured with rules to detect anomalous account usage patterns indicative of unauthorized access

checks.name: Unauthorized Software Execution is Detectable
checks.purpose: Verify AppLocker, WDAC, or EDR is configured to detect and alert on unauthorized software execution

checks.name: Logon Event Auditing is Enabled to Detect Unauthorized Access
checks.purpose: Verify logon success and failure auditing is enabled on the server

checks.name: Account Usage Anomaly Detection is Active
checks.purpose: Confirm a SIEM is configured with rules to detect anomalous account usage on the server

checks.name: Unauthorized Software Execution is Detectable
checks.purpose: Verify AppLocker, WDAC, or EDR detects unauthorized software execution on the server

checks.name: Privileged Account Usage is Monitored for Anomalies
checks.purpose: Confirm privileged account activity (admin logons, sensitive privilege use) is actively monitored for out-of-hours or unusual patterns

checks.name: Unexpected Network Connections are Detectable
checks.purpose: Verify network connection monitoring or firewall logging can detect unexpected outbound or lateral movement connections from this server

checks.name: Failed and Successful Logons are Logged and Monitored
checks.purpose: Verify auditd and PAM log all login attempts and these logs are monitored for unauthorized access patterns

checks.name: Last Login Information is Displayed at Logon
checks.purpose: Confirm the system displays last login time and source at successful logon to allow users to detect unauthorized prior access

checks.name: Unauthorized Process Execution is Monitored
checks.purpose: Verify auditd or a HIDS tool monitors for unexpected process execution that may indicate unauthorized system use

checks.name: Unexpected Network Connections are Detectable
checks.purpose: Confirm network monitoring tools or firewall logging can detect unexpected outbound connections indicative of unauthorized use

checks.name: Failed and Successful Logons are Logged and Monitored
checks.purpose: Verify auditd and PAM log all login attempts on Debian and these are monitored for unauthorized access

checks.name: Last Login Information is Displayed at Logon
checks.purpose: Confirm the system displays last login time and source at successful logon on Debian

checks.name: Unauthorized Process Execution is Monitored
checks.purpose: Verify auditd or a HIDS monitors for unexpected process execution on Debian

checks.name: Unexpected Network Connections are Detectable
checks.purpose: Confirm network monitoring can detect unexpected outbound connections on Debian

remediation: Enable comprehensive logon auditing. Deploy SIEM detection rules for anomalous account usage, off-hours logins, and lateral movement. Configure AppLocker or WDAC to alert on unauthorized execution. On Linux, configure auditd to log all login attempts and process execution, deploy a HIDS, and enable last-login display via PAM lastlog.
